title: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
summary_full: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.
summary_public: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Putin is helping Iran; fights the U.S. and Israel

RU.label: mixed
RU.evidence: Putin is helping Iran; aren't sharing intelligence
